title: Palindrome check (normalized)
description: Write is_palindrome(s) that returns True if s is a palindrome when ignoring case and any non-alphanumeric characters.
constraints: The empty string is a palindrome.
edge_tests: assert is_palindrome('A man, a plan, a canal: Panama') is True
assert is_palindrome('No lemon, no melon') is True
properties: assert fn(half + 'Z z!' + half[::-1]) is True
